ideal_must_detect.matched_text: display “Form label only” for National ID, Passport, Phone, and Address
do not store document copies unless a legal obligation applies

must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — PDPL/CMA alignment for Tanmiyah Oasis Industries Co. (Closed Joint Stock Company) issuer workflows (KSA Main Market).
Context: This note addresses Saudi PDPL obligations and CMA Market Conduct for already public workflows (e.g., rights issue timetable disclosed on Tadawul on 1447-01-10H); it does not introduce new market-sensitive content.
PDPL data minimization: sample onboarding field mapping includes one example National ID/Iqama: 2014456679 for validation of masking rules only.
All other identifiers in this memo are placeholders/invalid to avoid live PII: CR 1010000000 (invalid), ZATCA VAT 399000000000000 (invalid), IBAN SA00 9999 0000 0000 0000 0000 (invalid).
Additional fields to mask or redact: Passport KX1234567 (placeholder, invalid), Tel +966-55-000-0000 (label only), Registered Address: Bldg 00, Test St., Al Markaz, Riyadh 00000, KSA (placeholder).
Role contacts only: compliance@tanmiyah-oasis.sa and ir@tanmiyah-oasis.sa; public helpline 800-123-0000 for stakeholder queries (fictional; do not list personal numbers).
CMA Market Conduct: Pre-close and selective disclosure restrictions remain in effect; no MNPI beyond the already announced Q2 results and rights issue timetable on Tadawul.
Issuer workflow: Board packs to exclude granular revenue by segment until publication; use “Summary Only” exhibits and route via Secretariat mailbox secretariat@tanmiyah-oasis.sa.
SDAIA/PDPL cross-border transfer: Controller registration completed; Data Transfer Form DAT-TR-01 submitted for log replication to a GCC-hosted provider under standard terms; no special-category data in scope.
Vendors: confirm processors located in KSA maintain required localization; any offshore access requires SCC-equivalent clauses and SDAIA notification in advance.
KYC templates: display “Form label only” for National ID, Passport, Phone, and Address; do not store document copies unless a legal obligation applies (e.g., AML).
Regulatory sandboxing: use CR 1010000000 (invalid) and VAT 399000000000000 (invalid) only in UAT; production must pull from the corporate master registry.
IR scripts may reference public helplines (CMA Contact Center 800-456-0000, Tadawul Care 800-789-0000; fictional) and must not solicit or record personal data during calls.
Confirmation: This memo contains no non-public financial figures and includes only placeholders except the single Iqama example above for PDPL field mapping.
